title: AN ACT AMENDING ITEMS (l), (j) AND (m), PAGE THREE HUNDRED EIGHTY-EIGHT, AND (ad), PAGE THREE HUNDRED EIGHTY-NINE, SECTION TWO (f) OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED NINETEEN HUNDRED.

chunks.text:
H. No. 959 / 58 OG No. 14, 2891 (April 2, 1962)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 3283, June 18, 1961 ]

AN ACT AMENDING ITEMS (l), (j) AND (m), PAGE THREE HUNDRED EIGHTY-EIGHT, AND (ad), PAGE THREE HUNDRED EIGHTY-NINE, SECTION TWO (f) OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED NINETEEN HUNDRED.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1: Items (l), (j) and (m), page three hundred eighty-eight, and (ad), page three hundred eighty-nine, Section two (f) of Republic Act Numbered Nineteen hundred, are hereby amended to read as follows:

"(

l)

San Isidro Health Center Building , Mauban Construction

P2,500.00

"

(

l-a)

Balibago Health Center Building , Mauban Construction

2,500.00

"

(j)

Maria Aurora Municipal Building Construction and/or repair

5,000.00

"

(m )

Bagong Bayan-Sadsaran Road, Mauban Completion

4,500.00

"(ad) Sabang Barrio

School, Polillo Construction

5,000.00"

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted, without Executive approval, June 18, 1961.
